name: Chick Pea and Spinach Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté the chopped onion and minced garlic over low heat until the onion is translucent.
2. Add the skim milk and raise the heat to medium. Cook until boiling, stirring constantly.
3. Reduce the heat to prevent boiling over. Stir in the drained chickpeas, fresh spinach, cardamom, nutmeg, curry powder, salt, and pepper.
4. Continue cooking until the spinach is wilted. Remove from heat.
5. Transfer 1 1/2 cups of the soup to a blender or food processor and puree.
6. Return the purée to the soup and stir well. Serve hot.
Rinse the fresh spinach in warm salted water, drain, and shred or chiffonade before using.
